title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers outlines five techniques to reduce hallucinations in AI agents: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise queries, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardrails via Python code, and runtime steering for self-correction. Demonstrations use an open-source travel agent and highlight Amazon Bedrock AgentCore's production implementation.
